description_long: This object is a realistic red rose with a lush, multi-layered bloom composed of numerous overlapping petals that spiral outward from the center. The petals are deep red, velvety, and slightly curled at the edges, creating a full, rounded appearance. The flower is attached to a slender green stem, which is straight and supports the bloom upright. Two large, ovate green leaves with serrated edges are attached to the stem, along with a few smaller leaves further down. The overall structure is delicate and natural, with the flower head being the most prominent feature. The rose is visually striking and would be commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or as part of decorative arrangements.
description: A vibrant red rose with layered, spiraling petals and a green stem bearing ovate leaves. The bloom is full and lush, making it visually prominent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full, open face of the rose with layered petals and two large green leaves on the stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spiral arrangement of the petals, with the stem and leaves visible at an angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the outermost petals and the back of the bloom, with the stem and leaves extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the rose, with the petals' curvature and the arrangement of leaves along the stem.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a spiral configuration, with overlapping layers radiating outward from the center, creating a whorled and symmetrical appearance typical of hybrid tea roses.
